reviews.title: DO NOT COME HERE. DO NOT BOOK.
reviews.text:
Do not spend your money to book this hotel. I regret spending money to book here with my two children.

First of all, the name is very deceiving. On Agoda, I booked under the name “Sunset Sea Hotel.” After arriving to the hotel, I did not see the name—instead, it turned to “Hai Trieu Hotel.”

We were very confused for our safety and wondered if we were at the right place. I read other reviews and they were also deceived by the name. Do not come here.

Second of all, there is NO ONE to help you carry your luggage nor is there a baggage cart. This was very difficult. The hotel also does not have consistently cold air conditioning. The photos online are also deceiving, as they showed a restaurant with food, but upon arrival, we were told that they closed the restaurant 3 years ago.

I urge Agoda to investigate this hotel. Cleanliness was also an issue. This is fully deceiving all customers. Book somewhere else.

reviews.title: bad cleaning and not good service

reviews.title: Check google reviews!!
reviews.text:
The room we were given was very small, stuffy, and had mould on the walls. What made it worse is that it wasn’t made clear at all on Agoda that the room has no window—so it felt dark, enclosed, and quite depressing to stay in. On top of that, the room looked nothing like the photos online, which felt very misleading.

Cleanliness was another major issue. There were hairs in the bathroom that had clearly not been cleaned, and they actually clogged the drain—so every time we showered, the bathroom floor would flood. We also found used, dried-up contact lenses left on the desk, which was pretty shocking. The bathroom is also not provided with hand soap, when we requested it we were told to just use the body wash.

To their credit, the staff did move us to another room after we complained, but unfortunately it was basically the same. Same issues, just a different room. After that, communication became frustrating as the staff started ignoring my messages altogether.

We also had a serious safety concern during our stay. Another guest accidentally entered our room (this was not their fault, as they had mistaken it for their own) but the worrying part was that their key card actually unlocked our door. Knowing that other guests could potentially access our room was extremely unsettling.

There was also an issue with the minibar. It was not properly stocked when we arrived, which we didn’t mind at the time since we weren’t planning to use it anyway. However, when we checked out, staff tried to charge us for missing items. They repeatedly questioned what we had done with them and seemed unwilling to accept that the items were never there to begin with. Although this was eventually resolved, it was a frustrating and unnecessary situation.

Another thing that raised concerns was the reviews on Agoda. Many of them seem overly similar and give perfect 10 scores, which makes me question their authenticity. After this experience, I checked Google reviews and found that many other guests have reported the exact same problems.

I’m posting this review on Agoda specifically to warn other travellers to check reviews across multiple platforms before booking—something I really wish I had done.

Overall, I’m really upset with this stay. It completely affected our experience in Da Nang, and I would not recommend this hotel to others.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️

Unfortunately, our experience at Sunset Sea Hotel was disappointing despite the property’s good location.

One of the most concerning incidents occurred when housekeeping opened our room while my husband and child were still asleep inside. We understand that rooms need to be cleaned, but entering without proper confirmation or permission was uncomfortable and felt like an invasion of privacy.

We also had an unpleasant experience involving the front desk staff. My parents and children got lost at Son Tra Night Market and took a taxi back to the hotel. Since the cash was with us and they only had international bank cards, they were unable to pay the driver immediately. They politely asked the hotel staff if they could temporarily borrow 100,000 VND and assured them they would repay it as soon as we returned to the hotel. Instead of being understanding, one staff member became angry and started raising their voice. We appreciated that another staff member repeatedly apologized, but the situation could have been handled with much more professionalism and hospitality.

In addition, during our 6-day stay, we used the coffee cups provided in our room, but they were never replaced or cleaned. We ended up having the same dirty cups for the remainder of our stay, which was disappointing from a housekeeping standpoint.

While the hotel has potential, the lack of hospitality, inconsistent housekeeping, and poor handling of guest concerns left us with a negative impression. We hope management takes these issues seriously and improves their service for future guests

reviews.title: Pictures are so deceptive
reviews.text:
My God, this place was a scam. The pictures are straight up enhanced. The rooms are small, walls are dirty, and everything has a distinct smell. The "gym" is laughable, the restaurant is just a storage floor. I had messaged the hotel twice to leave a night early, no response, then to arrange airport pickup, still no response. 

If it wasn't because I'm out and about most of the day exploring, I would have eaten the cost and gone somewhere else. There are lots of options in this area.

The only saving grace was the rooftop pool which has a nice view, and the staff are friendly.

reviews.title: Big Disappointment
reviews.text:
Felt as though reviews and pictures did not accurately depict the actual hotel. Towels had holes in them,  bedding felt old and very used. Rooms were outdated and in need of repair. Did not feel clean at all. Cut our stay short, felt very uncomfortable being there. Staff often did not even look up at us when entering hotel. Doorman was pushy and when we asked for 3 pillows and 3 towels since we were 3 guests- it was the biggest deal for them to provide us. Even took pictures of our pillows as if we would take them. At checkout they charged us for the waters in room. Guess not included -No where is this mentioned. Also deadbolt removed from door. 
It’s easy to find something better!

reviews.title: Terrible Service
reviews.text:
We stayed one night at the hotel, and decided to stay another night. We had told the reception this information, however the reception told us that if we wanted to book the same room, the we had to book online. 

So we did so, come the next day around 11am - the staff contacted us via WhatsApp to say our room has already been reserved by another person and that we had to change rooms before 12pm. 

This was impossible as we were in Ba Na Hills, why would they let us know so late in the morning if someone had already booked our room? We told this information to the staff through WhatsApp, and were told to pay an extra 350k to reserve the room we were currently staying in. 

We felt cheated of our money, as we did communicate with the staff the night before and was told to book online.

reviews.title: Not as pictured on booking site!
reviews.text:
You will be sorely disappointed if you book thinking you are getting a newly remodeled place with clean and functioning facilities. Most of the chairs at the pool are broken / rusty and the two loungers are usually taken by smokers who sit on the rooftop all day. Gym was a joke. A couple weights (seriously like two) and a treadmill with a sign to contact staff if you’d like to use it. Door off hinges propped up. 

Bedroom ACs do not cool efficiently. We woke up sweating even with the fan and AC. Fan with caked on dust. Bathtub dirty. 

On a positive note, if you happen to book with a really low price, it might be worth it for you. Staff were extremely friendly. Security was available early mornings when we needed to get out motorbikes out (free basement parking). Daily cleaning ladies replaced bottled water and coffee. Location was nice. 

We just had a horrible start as the hotel we thought we booked based on photos was almost scam like. There is no restaurant. The remodel job was poorly done. And we paid more than we should have for a room with such low quality.

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text:
We stayed for 2 nights at this property, which is conveniently located in the city center. The night market and other attractions are easily accessible on foot, making it a great spot for exploring.

Pros:
	•	The receptionist was kind and helpful, providing excellent service throughout our stay.
	•	The property feels more like an apartment than a hotel, but the room was clean and comfortable.
	•	The bedsheets were fresh and smelled like new laundry, which was a nice detail.

Cons:
	•	There is no elevator, and our room was on the 4th floor. However, the staff was kind enough to help with our luggage, which made it manageable.

Overall, it’s a cozy and well-located place with friendly staff, but the lack of an elevator might be a challenge for guests with mobility issues or heavy luggage.

reviews.title: Comfortable stay
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful experience at Sunset Hotel (also known as Hai Trieu). Everything about the hotel was excellent – from the clean and comfortable rooms to the peaceful and relaxing atmosphere. What impressed me the most was the staff: they were incredibly helpful and always ready to meet my needs quickly and efficiently.

I will definitely come back and recommend this hotel to my friends and family!

Pros:

- pool (although ladder was detached)
- comfortable bed. 

Cons: 
- shower was weird that there was a viewing window with a pull down shade that's completely covered in mold. 
- faucet was moving and semi detached
- facilities weren't very clean
- carpets stained and dated
- pool ladder should be attached, bad things can happen. 

If you have a bit more money to spend, I would go elsewhere, otherwise, this wasn't bad.

By the time we checked in, I was very pleased; at 12:55, the receptionist allowed us to check in early, the bedding was clean, and since we were on the second floor, it was not noisy. I think the family’s room when they checked out was smaller in capacity, which led to their situation, or the staff after hearing the feedback took it into account to make improvements. The family suite has a bathtub, and perhaps not many people book such large family rooms, so the facilities are still new, quiet, and clean. I see staff taking the pillow and bed covers to wash every day. Overall, I am very satisfied.

reviews.title: Best in its price range.
reviews.text: Due to the nature of my job, recently I have spent a lot of time in Da Nang and stayed in quite a few hotels in this price range. I must say this is the best hotel in its price range: clean, well-equipped, located near the beach, spacious, comfortable, quiet with a deep, restful sleep. The front desk staff is quite decent; the only downside is that there seems to be a change or many new front desk staff, so they appeared somewhat tense when handling check-ins and check-outs, not very cheerful even though I am a regular guest who has returned a few times. This issue can probably be easily resolved as they become more accustomed to their jobs. In summary, aside from that small drawback, overall this is the most worthwhile place to stay for anyone traveling to Da Nang in this price range.

reviews.text: We were impressed by the interior of the hotel room and bathroom, as it was only a 3-star hotel but pretty much looked like other great hotels! For the price we paid which was $22 sgd per night, it was so worth it. The location is not the nearest to the city centre, but I would say it is better than staying at city centre, because traffic in Da Nang is so scary that it is safer to take a Grab than walk back to your hotel. Great service from hotel staff despite slight language barrier, and always can get Grab in seconds!

reviews.title: Going to the beach with mom
reviews.text: I have never traveled with my mother. This is my first trip. There are still many unfamiliarities in this new land, but I decided to travel independently rather than with a group to ensure I could manage my time and fit in with my online work. Therefore, I booked a hotel on Agoda, an app with many accommodations. I wanted a decent room, and compared to the price I paid, the experience here is truly wonderful. I stayed here for one night, and I felt that the staff were very enthusiastic, the accommodations were comfortable, the bed was clean and fresh. Thank you, Agoda, thank you, Sunset Sea, for helping me have a wonderful experience to further complete my trip at the beginning of a peaceful and loving new year 2024. Thank you.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
"When I have the chance to go to Da Nang, I often stop by this hotel. The staff is very polite and comfortable. The rooms are beautiful and clean. The view is spacious and lovely. Both the price and services are very good. I really like the spacious rooms. The location is wonderful, situated on a quiet street and within walking distance to the beach. 
Overall, I am very satisfied when staying here."

reviews.title: Fantastic Stay
reviews.text: I had a fantastic stay at this hotel. The staff was very kind, and the room was comfortable. I was able to take advantage of an Agoda discount, so the per-night price was incredibly worth it. Upon checkout, I was able to leave my luggage in their storage room until my flight. The storage room had a scale to weigh my luggage, which was useful for making sure my bags did not go over the weight limit.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean, tidy, and luxurious. The reception staff, employees, security, and housekeepers are all very nice. When I arrived, my friend got his clothes wet from the rain because we were traveling by motorbike. But everyone here was very enthusiastic in helping us to check in early. I think it's worth the money and I will come back here.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is beautiful, in a great location. Convenient for getting around, you can enjoy the wonderful atmosphere while strolling around. The hotel's service is very good. The staff is warm and friendly, supporting guests wholeheartedly. I am sure everyone who comes here once will want to return.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I was introduced here by a friend, and after experiencing the services, I am quite satisfied. Besides the clean and airy rooms, what impressed me the most was the attitude of the staff; they were very enthusiastic in supporting and assisting me during my stay. I will definitely come back.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
"My room was booked at a quite affordable price and the hotel is located near the beach, so at first I was a bit confused about the facilities and service quality. However, when I arrived, I was truly shocked. Our room was clean and everything was arranged in a very reasonable way that made the space feel very spacious. Another plus was that when we were leaving, my wife forgot her iPad charger at the hotel and when we realized it, we were already at the airport checking in. I thought it was lost, but no, the hotel staff even delivered it to the airport for us so we could catch our flight. Oh my god, so sweet! 
In summary, this is a hotel worth trying if you visit Da Nang!"

reviews.title: noise issues appeared again
reviews.text:
I chose to extend my stay and even paid more to keep the same room because it suited me well. However, noise issues appeared again, almost forcing me to change rooms once more, which was frustrating.

Airport transfer was mentioned in both of my reservations. Despite this, I had to push hard just to receive one transfer, and it felt like I was asking for a special favor rather than something already included.

The reception staff was again the weak point of this stay — poorly trained, sometimes defensive, and not guest-oriented. In contrast, the housekeeping ladies were excellent, reliable, and truly professional. They are clearly the strongest asset of this hotel.

With better front desk management and clearer respect of booking conditions, this hotel could be much better.

reviews.title: The housekeeping team was excellent
reviews.text:
The room itself was good and matched what was booked, including the upgrade that was already stated in my reservation. The housekeeping team was excellent — very professional, kind, and doing a great job every day. This really helped improve the overall stay.

Unfortunately, the main issue was noise. There were repeated disturbances during the week, and I had to raise the issue several times to finally get some calm. This took energy and should not be the guest’s responsibility.

The front desk staff lacked professionalism and consistency. Communication was unclear, and I often felt I had to insist for things that were already included in my booking.

Overall, the hotel has potential, but better sound management and more qualified reception staff would significantly improve the experience.
